title: Member of Technical Staff 3 [Full stack development - AI] [ 3-5yrs experience]
description:
**Hungry, Humble, Honest, with Heart.**
**The Opportunity**
 Nutanix is disrupting the multi\\-billion dollar cloud infrastructure market by pioneering the first hybrid cloud platform that can incrementally scale out to manage petabytes of data while running tens of thousands of virtual machines. This brings about exciting new challenges in building a cloud\\-scale distributed control plane that can serve a multitude of applications.
   

  

 You will work on new AI initiatives and feature consumption services that determine when and how Nutanix users leverage our software and services. This core capability will serve as a foundational platform to be utilized by other Nutanix features as well as consumers.
   

  

**About The Team**
 At Nutanix, you would be joining the SAAS team distributed across the United States and India. Our team thrives on open communication and collaboration, valuing every member's input to drive innovation and success. Regardless of physical location, we work seamlessly together to achieve our shared goals, fostering a supportive and inclusive team culture.
   

  

 You will report to the Senior Director, SaaS Engineering, who leads with expertise, guidance, and a strong focus on professional development. As part of our hybrid work setup, you will be required to work in the office 3 days per week, allowing for a balance between in\\-person collaboration and remote flexibility. While office attendance is encouraged for team synergy and project alignment, we understand the importance of a flexible work environment.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Design and build scalable, high\\-performance control plane software for enterprise and hybrid cloud with AI and multi\\-agent capabilities.
* Develop AI platform features integrating with Nutanix products leveraging AI and intelligent automation technologies.
* Build RESTful services following best practices for enterprise and SaaS integrations.
* Contribute to cloud and on\\-prem web applications with AI\\-enabled user experiences.
* Create scripts and tools for automation, troubleshooting, and debugging.
* Collaborate with global cross\\-functional teams with strong ownership and communication.
* Work with support and field teams to resolve complex technical issues.


**What You Will Bring**
* Bachelor or Master in Computer Science or related field with 3\\+ years of relevant industry experience.
* Hands\\-on experience in developing AI\\-powered applications and multi\\-agent systems, including agent coordination, orchestration frameworks, and scalable intelligent workflows.
* Passionate about programming and problem\\-solving, with a strong focus on writing clean and efficient code.
* Good knowledge of Data Structures and Algorithms.
* Solid understanding of core Front\\-end and Back\\-end concepts.
* Experience in developing web\\-based user interfaces using Javascript and ReactJS.
* Experience with server\\-side programming using NodeJS/ExpressJS, along with database integration.
* Experience in Python or Go is an added advantage.


**Work Arrangement**
 Hybrid: This role operates in a hybrid capacity, blending the benefits of remote work with the advantages of in\\-person collaboration. In locations where our workplace policy applies (i.e. San Jose, Durham, Mexico City, Bangalore, Pune, Hoofddorp, Belgrade, Barcelona, Singapore, Sydney and Tokyo), employees are expected to work onsite a minimum of 3 days per week to foster collaboration, team alignment, and access to in\\-office resources. Workplace type may vary based on location and team requirements. Please speak with your recruiter for details. Additional team\\-specific guidance and norms will be provided by your manager.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Full Stack
description:
**About Skylo**
 Skylo is a global Non\\-Terrestrial Network service provider based in Mountain View, CA, offering a service that allows smartphone and IoT cellular devices to connect directly over existing satellites. Skylo’s direct\\-to\\-device service is now live on millions of activated devices across five continents, with more than 60 million square kilometers of coverage, in partnership with multiple satellite operators, mobile network operators (MNOs), Tier\\-1 chipset makers, and OEMs. Devices connected over satellite are managed and served by Skylo's commercial NTN vRAN, featuring a 3GPP standards\\-based cloud\\-native base station and core. Skylo provides an anywhere, anytime connectivity solution that seamlessly roams between terrestrial and satellite networks. Our focus is on enabling connected services for people outdoors and connected workflows across three main verticals: mass\\-market consumer devices, automotive, and industrial IoT.
   

  

*This role is located Bangalore, India* 
*where we are onsite 3 days a week in office.*
**Summary Of How You Will Impact Skylo**
 Skylo is hiring a Senior Software Engineer, Full stack to help fulfill our mission of making satellite connectivity available to all. In this role, you will be a key contributor to the design, architecture, and implementation of the critical services of Skylo’s Connectivity Platform. You will be instrumental in creating best\\-in\\-class software infrastructure solutions, combining your deep technical knowledge with a passion for excellence. Your work will directly support the development of cloud services from ingesting and processing heavy data streams on the backend. You will also contribute to building cloud systems that are resilient, secure, and address data privacy. you will be instrumental in designing and building the data visibility platforms and user\\-facing portals that our internal teams rely on every day
   

  

**How You Will Contribute**
* Contribute to the design, build, and optimize high\\-throughput, real\\-time data pipelines to process and aggregate network and system telemetry.
* Work closely with engineers, implementing best practices and actively engaging in design and code reviews.
* Design and develop distributed application services, microservices, and scalable database systems and contribute to architectural decisions for our observability platform to ensure it is scalable, reliable, and maintainable
* Take ownership of features, from backend API design and database modeling to frontend implementation and user experience.
* Create a powerful and intuitive web portal from the ground up using modern frameworks like React or Angular, enabling users to explore and visualize complex datasets.
* Design and implement flexible, user\\-configurable dashboards and widgets that provide at\\-a\\-glance visibility into network health and performance.
* Work with a diverse set of technologies, including backend languages (Python, Go, Java), messaging brokers (Kafka, GCP Pub/Sub), and databases (SQL and NoSQL).
* Define, design, and implement REST APIs, building out Swagger UI and Postman collections.
* Contribute to the design and development of distributed application services, microservices, and scalable database systems. You will also define, design, and implement REST APIs.
* Integrate with third\\-party application systems using REST APIs and/or messaging queues.
* Define and execute component test scenarios and test cases, including unit testing, code coverage, and API test automation.
* Participate in build and deployment processes using tools like Jira, Jenkins, GCR/GKE.
* Enforce security best practices in both software development and deployment.
* Drive observability using Prometheus and log/data collectors for monitoring and diagnostics.
* Evaluate and adopt new technologies to improve system performance and developer productivity.


**What We Look For**
* 5\\-8 years of experience in professional software development with a focus on object\\-oriented programming (OOP) and distributed microservices.
* A Master's or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Wide\\-ranging experience with cloud technologies and tech stacks, with the ability to resolve complex issues creatively and effectively.
* Proficiency in Python, Java or/and Go programming languages.
* Proven experience designing, building, and scaling data pipelines.
* Strong proficiency in modern frontend development with React.js or Angular.js.
* Demonstrable experience building complex, data\\-driven user interfaces, including interactive charts, graphs, and dashboards.
* Expertise in query optimization, partitioning, and performance tuning in SQL and big data query engines.
* Strong hold on dealing with metrics, logs, and traces from distributed systems using Open Telemetry, Prometheus, and data collector frameworks.
* Experience developing microservices using the Spring\\-Boot framework or Go language frameworks.
* Prior working experience with messaging brokers like Kafka or GCP Pub/Sub to build event\\-driven microservices architectures.
* Experience with REST API and gRPC design.
* Strong understanding of distributed systems for massive horizontal scaling.
* Working experience with Kubernetes, Docker, Jenkins, and GCP.
* Solid understanding of database technologies, including Redis, SQL (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL), and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB).
* Strong problem\\-solving and communication skills, with the ability to lead technical discussions.


**What We Offer**
 With employees working across three continents, Skylo is proud to be an equal opportunity employer dedicated to building an inclusive and diverse workforce. Our worldwide and inclusive culture encourages a flexible approach to work, and we also offer an attractive range benefits such as:
   

  

* Competitive compensation packages including a stock option based equity program
* Comprehensive benefits plan
* Monthly allowances for wellness and education reimbursement
* A generous time off policy, holidays, and the opportunity to temporarily work abroad
* Once in a lifetime opportunity to be a part of developing and running world’s first commercial, live direct\\-to\\-device satellite network and service
* Access to world\\-class team and talent across tech domains: software, hardware, chipsets, telecom, satellite and network virtualization
* Open, transparent, inclusive culture that blends the Silicon Valley, Nordic and South Asia characteristics


**EEO Statement**
 Skylo is an equal\\-opportunity employer and we celebrate diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, ancestry, national origin, caste, sex, sexual orientation, parent or caregiver status, political affiliation, gender, gender identity or expression, age, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic makeup, marital status, or military service consistent with applicable federal, state, and local laws.
   

  

 We are also committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. Please let us know if you need assistance or accommodation due to a disability.

description:

 Skylo is a global Non\\-Terrestrial Network service provider based in Mountain View, CA, offering a service that allows smartphone and IoT cellular devices to connect directly over existing satellites. Skylo’s direct\\-to\\-device service is now live on millions of activated devices across five continents, with more than 60 million square kilometers of coverage, in partnership with multiple satellite operators, mobile network operators (MNOs), Tier\\-1 chipset makers, and OEMs. Devices connected over satellite are managed and served by Skylo's commercial NTN vRAN, featuring a 3GPP standards\\-based cloud\\-native base station and core.  Skylo is hiring a Principal Software Engineer for the Connectivity Platform team, you will be a technical cornerstone, helping fulfill Skylo's mission of making satellite connectivity available to all. You will be a technical authority, responsible for driving the architecture, design, and implementation of our most critical product features and services. Your influence will extend across multiple functional groups, ensuring that our backend platform is scalable, resilient, and built to the highest standards. You will lead by example, setting the bar for engineering quality and guiding teams through complex technical challenges, elevating the skills of the entire team.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute**
* Architect and Design: Lead the design and architecture of complex, large\\-scale, and distributed backend systems. You will take ownership of critical architecture decisions, design patterns, and infrastructure choices.
* Drive Technical Strategy: Define and steer the technical strategy for major components and product features, working closely with engineering leadership, product managers, and other key stakeholders.
* Lead Implementation: Own and lead the implementation of large\\-scale features, from initial design and prototyping through to testing and deployment. You will be hands\\-on, solving the most challenging technical problems.
* Champion Engineering Excellence: Drive a culture of high quality and continuous improvement through rigorous code and design reviews. You will champion best practices like clean code, test\\-driven development (TDD), and DevOps maturity.
* Mentor and Advise: Act as a technical advisor and mentor to senior, mid\\-level, and junior engineers, promoting best practices and elevating the technical skills of the team.
* Ensure Quality and Security: Define component test scenarios, drive API test automation, and ensure high code coverage. You will implement and enforce security best practices throughout the software development lifecycle.
* Optimize and Scale: Identify performance bottlenecks and lead initiatives to optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability.
* Innovate and Evaluate: Evaluate and recommend emerging tools, technologies, and frameworks to keep our platform modern, efficient, and innovative.


**What We Look For**
* Experience: 16\\+ years of progressive experience in software engineering, with a strong focus on backend development and the architecture of distributed systems.
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
* Technical Leadership: A proven track record of technical leadership, including owning the design of major features, mentoring engineers, and successfully driving engineering\\-wide initiatives.
* Backend Expertise: Deep proficiency in one or more programming languages (e.g., Java, Go, Python). Extensive experience with microservices architecture, API design (REST, gRPC), and API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI).
* Strong expertise in data stores (SQL and NoSQL), caching systems (Redis, Memcached), and message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, or Pub/Sub).
* Cloud\\-Native Fluency: Solid understanding of cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or Azure). Hands\\-on experience with containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and building robust CI/CD pipelines (ex. Jenkins, GitLab CI).
* Quality and Observability: Strong knowledge of engineering best practices, including automated testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, TestNG).
* Experience with observability tools for monitoring, logging, and tracing (ex. Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK stack, OpenTelemetry).
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non\\-technical audiences.
* Proven ability to work cross\\-functionally and influence decisions through technical expertise.


**What We Offer**
 With employees working across three continents, Skylo is proud to be an equal opportunity employer dedicated to building an inclusive and diverse workforce. Our worldwide and inclusive culture encourages a flexible approach to work, and we also offer an attractive range benefits such as:
   

  

* Competitive compensation packages including a stock option based equity program
* Comprehensive benefits plan
* Monthly allowances for wellness and education reimbursement
* A generous time off policy, holidays, and the opportunity to temporarily work abroad
* Once in a lifetime opportunity to be a part of developing and running world’s first commercial, live direct\\-to\\-device satellite network and service
* Access to world\\-class team and talent across tech domains: software, hardware, chipsets, telecom, satellite and network virtualization
* Open, transparent, inclusive culture that blends the Silicon Valley, Nordic and South Asia characteristics

title: Senior Software Engineer - Full Stack
description:
NVIDIA has been transforming computer graphics, PC gaming, and accelerated computing for more than 25 years. It’s a unique legacy of innovation that’s fueled by great technology—and amazing people. Today, we’re tapping into the unlimited potential of AI to define the next era of computing. An era in which our GPU acts as the brains of computers, robots, and self\\-driving cars that can understand the world. Doing what’s never been done before takes vision, innovation, and the world’s best talent. As an NVIDIAN, you’ll be immersed in a diverse, supportive environment where everyone is inspired to do their best work. Come join the team and see how you can make a lasting impact on the world.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer \\- Full Stack who’s excited to build Security Solutions at NVIDIA. Join us to secure the AI era!
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Design and build unified security services for NVIDIA Security Platform, integrating detection, orchestration, and automated response capabilities.
* Partner with product engineering, security architecture, and cloud infrastructure teams to embed secure design patterns and automation across private, public, and emerging AI\\-native clouds.

www.EnchargeAi.com
 



 Location : Bangalore
 



**Title : Principal Physical Design Engineer** 




  





 Principal Physical Design Engineer (RTL\\-to\\-GDSII)
 



 Bangalore
 



 EnCharge AI is a leader in advanced AI hardware and software systems for edge\\-to\\-cloud computing. EnCharge’s robust and scalable next\\-generation in\\-memory computing technology provides orders\\-of\\-magnitude higher compute efficiency and density compared to today’s best\\-in\\-class solutions. The high\\-performance architecture is coupled with seamless software integration and will enable the immense potential of AI to be accessible in power, energy, and space constrained applications. EnCharge AI launched in 2022 and is led by veteran technologists with backgrounds in semiconductor design and AI systems.
 



**Job Title: Principal Physical Design Engineer (RTL\\-to\\-GDSII)** 




**Experience:** 
 14\\+ Years
 



**Technology Focus:** 
 Sub\\-5nm (3nm/2nm)
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore Hybrid
 



  





**The Vision** 




 We are seeking a
 **Principal Physical Design Engineer** 
 who thrives on complexity and rejects the "black box" approach to EDA tools. This role is for a
 **First Principles thinker** 
 who questions the status quo. If a standard flow isn't yielding the desired PPA (Power, Performance, Area), you dive into the PDK, the tool algorithms, and the methodology to find a better way. You are responsible for transforming raw RTL into world\\-class silicon by eliminating systemic bottlenecks and building a scalable, predictable path to GDSII.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Full\\-Flow Ownership:** 
 Lead the implementation of massive, high\\-speed blocks/SoCs from Synthesis through Sign\\-off using the
 **Cadence Digital Suite** 
 .
* **PPA Optimization:** 
 Push the theoretical limits of the PDK and tools. You will analyze and optimize the interplay between library cells, metal stacks, and tool engines to squeeze out every millivolt and picosecond.
* **Methodology \\& Scalability:** 
 Build and refine a "Push\\-Button" style execution methodology that is robust, repeatable, and minimizes manual "human\\-in\\-the\\-loop" iterations.
* **Cross\\-Functional "Left\\-Shift":** 
 Collaborate with RTL, Architecture, and DFT teams to influence design decisions early. You will drive a holistic approach where physical constraints inform the architecture, not just react to it.
* **Bottleneck Elimination:** 
 Identify "drag" in the execution pipeline—whether it’s runtime, convergence issues, or tool limitations—and architect automated solutions to bypass them.



  





**Technical Qualifications** 




  





  





**Experience** 




 14\\-20 years in Physical Design with a proven track record of multiple
 **sub\\-5nm** 
 tape\\-outs.
 



**Tool Suite** 




 Mastery of
 **Cadence Innovus** 
 , Tempus, Joules, Pegasus, and Voltus.
 



**Advanced Nodes** 




 Deep understanding of sub\\-5nm physics: EUV constraints, multi\\-patterning, FinFET and IR/EM challenges.
 



**Sign\\-off** 




 Expert\\-level knowledge in Static Timing Analysis (STA), Physical Verification (PV), and Power Integrity (PI) and ECO methodology.
 



**Scripting** 




 Proficiency in
 **Tcl and Python** 
 to develop custom flow wrappers and data\\-mining tools for PPA analysis.
 



  





**Soft Skills \\& Leadership** 



* **Holistic Thinking:** 
 You look at the "Big Picture." You solve timing by fixing the floorplan or the RTL/ARCH
* **Influence \\& Rapport:** 
 You can build strong technical bridges with Front\\-End, Foundry, and EDA vendors to align on a unified execution strategy.
* **Critical Thinking:** 
 You operate on first principles. You don't just follow a vendor's "Best Practices" if they don't make sense for our specific architecture.
* **Mentorship:** 
 You act as a force multiplier, elevating the technical competence of the entire PD team.



  





**Why Join This Team?** 




 In this role, you aren't just a "user" of tools; you are an engineer who shapes how silicon is built. You will have the autonomy to overhaul legacy flows and the resources to execute on cutting\\-edge nodes that define the industry's future.
 



  





**Contact:** 




 Uday
 



 muday\\_bhaskar@yahoo.com
 



 www.mulyatech.com

title: System Engineer (Aerospace 10+years- ARP4754)
description:
**Job description** 




  





**System Engineer** 

 \\- Aerospace (ARP4754\\)
 




**Location:** 

 Indore, Madhya Pradesh
 




**Expeirence :** 
 10\\+ Years
 



  





 Company Description
 



 Qubist Solutions LLC is a leader in software innovations, architecture, design, development, and testing for industries such as avionics, automotive, medical, railways, IoT, and digital solutions. With extensive expertise in Aerospace and Avionics Software Design, Qubist specializes in development and Verification \\& Validation (V\\&V) processes adhering to RTCA/DO\\-178B standards for software levels A through D. Our company is committed to delivering cutting\\-edge solutions that meet the highest industry standards. Partnering with us means contributing to ground breaking advancements across diverse technical domains.
 



  





 Role Description
 



 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role for a System Engineer \\- Aerospace (ARP4754\\) based in Indore, Madhya Pradesh. The System Engineer will be responsible for designing and overseeing system architecture, ensuring seamless system integration, and leading systems engineering efforts. The role also involves collaborating with software development teams to deliver innovative and reliable avionics solutions, meeting compliance standards and quality requirements.
 



  





 As a key technical leader, you'll be at the forefront of building the embedded networks that power everything from commercial airliners and rotorcraft to next\\-gen military fighters. You’ll play a pivotal role in shaping and deploying resilient, deterministic networks capable of handling the extreme demands of real\\-time flight operations.
 



  





 Skills we need are:
 



 \\- extensive knowledge of avionics systems in part 23 and 25 aircraft (part 27 and 29 helicopters a bonus). Air data, AHRS, GNSS, Flight Management and Flight Control are areas of particular interest. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience with ARP4754B and ARP4761A in preparing FHA and SSA analysis. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience preparing FMEA/FMECA and Fault Tree Analysis. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience preparing reliability, availability, testability and maintainability analysis using MIL\\-HDBK\\-217 and other tools. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience converting customer requirements to system level requirements. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience working with the relevant engineering disciplines to break system requirements down in to high level requirements by discipline. 
 



  





 \\- extensive experience writing test plans covering environmental (DO\\-160\\) and operational (MOPS) requirements. 
 



  





 Also:
 



 \\- experience with FAA PSCP development an advantage. 
 



 \\- experience with DO\\-178C and DO\\-254 planing documents advantage. 
 



 \\- experience with DO\\-326B, 356A \\& 355 security plans and processes an advantage. 
 



  





 Excellent written and spoken English are essential. The ability to maintain relationships with European and US customers is a critical part of this role. 
 



  





 What You Will Do:
 



  




* Architect and design computing systems for aircraft management that meet the stringent requirements of safety\\-critical avionics systems.
* Serve as the technical authority and point of contact for all computing and graphics\\-related questions across multiple programs.
* Capture and translate source requirements into system architecture, interface definitions, and configuration strategies.
* Collaborate with internal computing, graphics, and networking fellows, and cross\\-functional experts to shape the next generation of secure, fault\\-tolerant avionics computing and graphics systems.
* Lead system\\-level integration, troubleshooting, and verification activities in lab environments.
* Drive the development of automated test strategies and tools and ensure robust validation across network interfaces.
* Mentor other systems engineers and collaborate closely with hardware, software, and firmware teams to deliver cohesive and scalable system designs.
* Contribute to the bid and pursuit process, providing technical insight and proposal leadership for networking solutions.
* Willingness to travel as needed.



  





 Qualifications
 


* Typically requires a B.E.\\\\B.Tech\\\\ M.Tech\\\\M.E. and minimum 6 years prior relevant experience in a writing system requirements for avionics systems.
* End\\-to\\-end systems engineering experience: requirements definition, design, integration, V\\&V, and deployment.
* Experience with real\\-time embedded systems, hardware/software interfaces, and systems integration.
* Expertise in designing and specifying computing and graphics architectures, including but not limited to:
* Communication protocols: ARINC 429, MIL\\-STD\\-1553, ARINC 629, or ARINC 818\\.
* Embedded Computing or System on a Chip.
* Experience with safety\\-critical development standards, such as DO\\-178C, DO\\-254, ARP4754B, and ARP4761
* Familiarity with avionics standards such as RTCA/DO\\-178B is a plus
* Ability to work collaboratively in an on\\-site environment in Bengaluru/Pune
* Background in virtualized architectures, data flows, or advanced avionics bus protocols
* Experience with Model\\-Based Systems Engineering
* Excellent interpersonal and technical communication skills, including documentation and interface negotiation
* Strong sense of ownership, mission focus, and the ability to thrive in high\\-reliability aerospace environments
* Familiarity with ARINC 653, ARINC 661, or FACE architecture.
* Experience with software security and partitioning strategies.
* Background in agile methodologies and DevOps for embedded systems.
* Exposure to model\\-based design tools such as SCADE, Simulink, or Enterprise Architect.
* Expertise in C/C\\+\\+ programming, real\\-time operating systems (e.g., VxWorks, INTEGRITY).
* Hands\\-on experience in design and development of FMS, Mission Computer, Display Software, or similar.
* Thorough understanding of software safety standards (DO\\-178C) and system\\-software interfaces.
* Strong analytical skills and experience with architectural modelling tools (e.g., UML, SysML).
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills; experience working with global teams.
